intro: Sinningia schomburgkiana, commonly known as Brazilian petunia or eye catcher, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems.
